subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Lord! The musk-laden breeze from the hidden treasury of mysteries hath been wafted upon all regions and the senses of the righteous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده پروردگار نفحه مشکبار از نافه اسرار بر جمیع اقطار نثار گشت مشام ابرار
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @spiritual transformation, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
